text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I visit the hot spring with Mayano Top Gun one
day after completing numerous races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pitter-patter, pitter-patter... Rattle!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Maya comes in for the landing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heya, Trainer! I'm here, right in your room!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh, don't be like some boring teacher! You're
supposed to say "Hi, Maya" with a look of love in
your eyes!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting and waiting for this trip to the
hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're using the hot spring vacation coupon we
won at the shopping district for this trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Mayano Top Gun has accomplished her
goals, this is our chance to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're both going to alleviate our exhaustion by
kicking back and relaxing a little.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But how come we're in separate rooms?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you gonna get lonely? Do you really want
to be by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mmgrgh... But like...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If you're by yourself, who are you gonna have
pillow fights and play cards with?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I can do those things with you! If you're with me,
you'll have a hundred times more fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell from her face just how much she wants
to goof off with me...
choice_data_list: Okay, we can hang out for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! See? Even you think it's so much more fun
with me around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not often that we get to relax like this, so
Mayano Top Gun and I spend some time
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I realize it, the entire day has passed. We
should get moving if we actually want to use the
hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaaawn...
choice_data_list: ...Looks like she's done for the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't bring myself to wake her up, so I leave her
sleeping in my room and go to the hot spring
alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Don't leave me behind like that, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sob... I wanna take a bath too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yawn...
choice_data_list: Don't fall asleep while you're in the water.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay...
choice_data_list: I'll be waiting until you're done.
I'll be waiting until you're done.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Here? You're gonna stay here the whole
time?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying I can see you the second I'm
finished?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Don't you go anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! It's like you're my dad.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! It's like you're my mom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! That felt so good! I feel nice and warm all
over!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! I've got a thousand times more energy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, they're selling ice cream over there!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And it's triple scoop! Not single, not double, but
triple! I want vanilla, strawberry, and chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha. Hurry up! I'm about to take off. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mayano Top Gun runs off to the ice
cream vendor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we came to the hot spring to relax, sure
enough, I'm being dragged around once more...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What flavor would you like? We could go halfsies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Mayano Top Gun and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
